title: ceratozamia latifolia
intro: Ceratozamia latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved zamia, is a type of cycad plant that belongs to the family Zamiaceae. This plant is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ceratozamia latifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparation of this plant is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
